SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2006 - JUDGMENT ENTERED (303)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CASKIEBEN LLC RECOVER FROM APPELLANT STEELE, LARRY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT, JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT LARRY STEELE AND AGAINST RESPONDENT CASKIEBEN LLC IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 PRINCIPAL AND $105.00 COSTS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS DEFENDANT LARRY STEELE SHALL PAY $2500.00 TO CASKIBEN LLC AND DAVE JOHNSON AND IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT, CASKIBEN & JOHNSON SHALL PAY STEELE $500.00 PRINCIPAL AND $105.00 IN COSTS.

RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT STEELE, LARRY AS TO RESPONDENT CASKIEBEN LLC JOHNSON, DAVE HEARING SET FOR AUG-10-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 816179
